positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical mandala-style celestial flora illustration. The design features stylized cosmic ferns, blooming nebula patterns, and geometric astronomical elements, rendered in a high-contrast linocut woodcut style using a deep sapphire blue and luminous gold limited color palette. The composition must be entirely contained within a central circular format, emphasizing perfect radial symmetry, strong, clean silhouettes, and intricate line work. The overall aesthetic should be sophisticated, vintage, and highly graphic, suitable for a bold textile apparel print.
